result.summary: The page has visible responsive/layout problems, mainly horizontal content being clipped off the right edge and a fixed bottom navigation overlapping game content.

issues.description: Multiple horizontal sections overflow the viewport. The top category pill for “Hot Games” is cut off, and the rightmost game cards in the game rows are partially cropped off-screen.
issues.suggestion: Review the mobile responsive layout. Use a proper horizontal carousel with clear scroll behavior/fade indicators, or reduce card widths/gaps so content fits within the viewport without unintended clipping.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game grid content, hiding parts of the cards near the bottom of the screen.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the main content equal to the height of the fixed bottom nav so scrollable content is not covered.

issues.description: The top category navigation looks visually cramped, with the last visible item truncated abruptly at the right edge.
issues.suggestion: Add horizontal padding, a fade/scroll affordance, or adjust pill sizing so users understand the row is scrollable and items are not accidentally clipped.
